title: A Genius With Amnesia - Victor Savkin, Nx
summary: Victor Savkin argues that current coding agents lack context and memory continuity across interactions, making them ineffective despite individual capability. He uses an analogy of a genius engineer who can only see a tiny corner of a codebase and forgets everything between interactions to illustrate the problem that needs solving.
